headline: Mark Cuban Embraces Elon Musk's Humor: 'I Have No Problem Throwing Elon Under The Bus, But I'll Save It For When It's Truly Deserved'
summary: In the wake of a recent Secret Service probe into Elon Musk's online remarks, billionaire entrepreneur Mark Cuban has come to the defense of the Tesla Inc. CEO's contentious social media conduct.

headline: Amazon Going Nuclear? Hiring Plans Indicate Company May Be Eyeing Nuclear To Meet Energy Needs
summary: Recent developments suggest that Amazon may be ramping up its interest in nuclear energy to fuel its growing needs.

headline: Tesla A Tale Of 2 Regions, Rivian Unleashes More Powerful R1 Variants, Nio Aims Sales Surge With Low-End Model And More: Biggest EV Stories Of The Week
summary: The Fed rate cuts could bring some relief to the struggling EV industry, which is stymied by demand decline and severe cash crunch.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Apple, Palantir, Walmart, Home Depot — And An Analyst Predicts Dogecoin Will Outperform Bitcoin In 2025
summary:
Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.



The three major averages posted weekly gains, with the S&P 500 rising 1.36% and up over 19% for 2024, while the Dow gained 1.62% and the Nasdaq advanced 1.49%.

headline: Elon Musk Claps Back After SEC Threatens Sanctions Against Tesla CEO For Evading Twitter Depositions, Says He Was Overseeing 'Highest Risk Astronaut Mission' Of SpaceX: 'I Had To Make A Go Vs No-Go Decision. Their Lives Came First'
summary: The SEC has requested a federal judge to sanction Elon Musk for repeatedly failing to appear for a deposition regarding his 2022 Tesla stock sales and Twitter acquisition, despite a court order.

headline: Pro-Bitcoin El Salvador President Nayib Bukele Meets Elon Musk At Tesla's Giga Texas, Hails Billionaire CEO As 'One Of The Great Minds Of Our Time'
summary: President of El Salvador Nayib Bukele visited Tesla Inc's gigafactory in Texas and spent several hours talking with company CEO Elon Musk, the leader said on Friday.

headline: Qualcomm Reportedly Eyes Potential Takeover Of Intel Amid 60% Stock Decline, But Antitrust Concerns Loom
summary: Qualcomm has reportedly approached Intel for a potential takeover, which, if successful, would mark one of the largest technology acquisitions ever, though the deal faces significant antitrust scrutiny.

headline: Tesla's Stock Performance In 2019 And 2024 Shows 'Striking' Similarities, Says Gary Black: Flags This Reason That May Lead To Price Surge In 2025
summary: The similarities between Tesla Inc's stock performance this year as compared to 2019 are 'striking,' The Future Fund LLC managing partner Gary Black said on Friday, throwing caution to short sellers.

headline: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon Calls For Federal Employees To Return To Office, Says Empty Buildings 'Bother' Him: 'I Can't Believe...'
summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon has called for federal employees in Washington, DC, to return to their offices, highlighting the ongoing debate over remote work policies.
